_comment: Example of one HEC event the helper POSTs (illustrative values). 'host' becomes SDL serverHost and is the ORIGINATING device, never the collector. The collector is captured in the metadata.log.collector_* fields. Some fields you may see in SDL (e.g. field1/field2/Log Provider) come from the SDL-side parser bound to the sourcetype, not from this payload.
event: 1782156606.447638852 ap-01 events type=association radio='1' vap='2' client_mac='AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:04' band='5' channel='140'
